calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 4
Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Rowena Hui is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendants Dina Ajtzip, Francisco Lopez, Jorge Alvarado, Ana Mata are present.
Attorney Fred Herold appearing for defendants Dina Ajtzip amd Francisco Lopez in limited scope.
Attorney Christopher Dewys appearing for defendants Jorge Alvarado and Ana Mata in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Dec. 08, 2014 is vacated. (501/jpt)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2014 Off Calendar
